g.text: F1 Software updates vs database capture, over the run

text.style: fill: #9a9a9a; font: italic 9px 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start

g.text: Capture begins with V2 (Jan 29–Feb 2 active-zone counts invalid from an uncorrected tracking offset, re-estimated here). Feb 3–9 were pruned from the database but survive in the daily-report archive (hatched). A calibration fix on Feb 12 restores clean capture. Behaviour modes and gestures enter the data as the software adds them — the five-mode vocabulary (AWARE) only appears from Mar 15.

path.style: fill: #e8a23d; stroke: #e8a23d; stroke-width: 1.0; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-linejoin: miter
